segments.text: Even next week, it's probably just Dabuz
segments.original_text: 来週見てもDabuz選手しかやらないでしょ

segments.text: So Chico's not in the picture now
segments.original_text: さあチコがいない状況ですから

segments.text: Makes it tough to play aggressive
segments.original_text: ちょっとアグレッシブには行きづらいかな

segments.text: That's kind of the vibe I'm getting
segments.original_text: というような感じがしますが
崖上に追い詰められて空後

full_text: Even next week, it's probably just Dabuz. So Chico's not in the picture now. Makes it tough to play aggressive. That's kind of the vibe I'm getting. Gets cornered at ledge... bair! High damage!
